wo-dto-api-consolidation.title: [S0-1] DTO & API Governance Consolidation
wo-dto-api-consolidation.instruction_raw: Consolidate and categorize DTOs in `modules/simulation/api.py` and `modules/system/api.py` based on the God DTO V2 Audit. MANDATORY: 1) Move/verify Common types (AgentID, ItemDTO) in `modules/system/api.py`. 2) Enforce External vs Internal boundaries. 3) Standardize NewTypes and Enums. This is the mandatory baseline before any Stream 1/2 logic begins.

wo-mock-leak-repair.title: [S3-1] Resolve MagicMock Leaks in Planners
wo-mock-leak-repair.instruction_raw: Identify and fix MagicMock leaks where planners are not properly cleaned up after ticks. Ensure all mocks are disposed of to prevent memory growth.

wo-ssot-purity-ledger.title: [S1-1] Integer Purity (Ledger & Bank)
wo-ssot-purity-ledger.instruction_raw: Enforce strict integer arithmetic for all monetary values. Remove all 'float()' and 'round()' calls in ledger.py and central_bank_system.py. Ensure all balance mutations use Pennies (int).

wo-ssot-purity-ids.title: [S2-1] Agent ID Normalization
wo-ssot-purity-ids.instruction_raw: Replace all 'str(id)' and string-based agent ID comparisons with direct 'int' (AgentID) comparisons in world_state.py and settlement_system.py. Standardize on the AgentID NewType.

wo-ssot-authority.title: [S1-2] Behavioral Sinking (Settlement Authority)
wo-ssot-authority.instruction_raw: Refactor SettlementSystem to sink side-effects (IMonetaryLedger, MetricsService) into the atomic transfer block. Ensure all public methods return transactions for 'Bubble-Up' logging. Eliminate 'God Mode' minting bypasses.

wo-ssot-intent.title: [S1-3] Intent Unification (Transaction Processor)
wo-ssot-intent.instruction_raw: Refactor TransactionProcessor handlers to use SettlementSystem.process_transfer() exclusively for all balance mutations. Remove logic duplication between handlers and systems.

wo-ssot-cleanup.title: [S1-4] Orchestration Cleanup
wo-ssot-cleanup.instruction_raw: Delete redundant Phase_MonetaryProcessing (4.7). Remove ledger-processing logic from Phase3_Transaction to ensure side-effects are only handled by the Transaction Authority.

wo-firm-factory-core.title: [S2-2] Atomic FirmFactory Code Refactor
wo-firm-factory-core.instruction_raw: Implement the core logic of Atomic FirmFactory spec. Ensure AgentRegistry.register() precedes Bank account creation and Liquidity Injection. Implement 'Soft-Kill' (is_active=False) on initialization failure. Use strict Protocol validation in Bootstrapper.

wo-firm-factory-tests.title: [S2-3] FirmFactory Test & Fixture Overhaul
wo-firm-factory-tests.instruction_raw: Refactor all 20+ test call sites and fixtures to remove the 'simulation' God Object dependency. Align test factories with the new IFirmFactory protocol (agent_registry, world_state injection).
